name: Zach King
oneLine: American digital magician known for tightly edited illusion videos on Vine, TikTok and YouTube.
bio: Zach King is an American filmmaker and internet personality born February 4, 1990, who started posting on YouTube in 2008 and broke out on Vine in 2013 with his six-second 'magic vines.' He calls his style 'digital sleight of hand' - everyday illusions built entirely with practical tricks and visual effects in post. He has tens of millions of followers on TikTok and YouTube, and his 2019 TikTok 'Zach King's Magic Broomstick' was certified by Guinness World Records as the most viewed video on TikTok at over 2.2 billion views.
